# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

# Namespace configuration with mesh-wide policies still enforced
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: low-latency-services
  labels:
    # Do NOT disable injection at namespace level to maintain security for other workloads
    # Only disable at pod level for specific services that require it
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: low-latency-platform
---
# NetworkPolicy to restrict traffic for pods without sidecar proxy
# Since these pods bypass mesh mTLS, we must enforce network-level security
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: restrict-no-sidecar-ingress
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    security.policy/type: compensating-control
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    # Only allow traffic from explicitly listed sources
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/part-of: low-latency-platform
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: approved-client
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
  egress:
    # Restrict egress to only necessary destinations
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/part-of: low-latency-platform
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
    # Allow DNS resolution
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              k8s-app: kube-dns
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
---
# Low-latency data processing service - sidecar disabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
    app.kubernetes.io/name: low-latency-data-processor
    app.kubernetes.io/component: data-processor
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: low-latency-platform
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: kubectl
    security.policy/sidecar-exempt: "true"
    security.policy/exemption-reason: "latency-sensitive-workload"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-data-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-data-processor
        app.kubernetes.io/name: low-latency-data-processor
        app.kubernetes.io/component: data-processor
        # Label used by NetworkPolicy to identify non-sidecar pods
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
      annotations:
        # Disable Istio sidecar injection for this specific deployment
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        # Document the security justification for disabling sidecar
        security.policy/justification: >-
          Sidecar proxy disabled for sub-millisecond latency requirements.
          Compensating controls: NetworkPolicy, application-level TLS,
          read-only filesystem, non-root execution, resource limits.
        security.policy/approved-by: "security-team"
        security.policy/review-date: "2024-01-15"
    spec:
      # Use a dedicated service account with minimal permissions
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-data-processor-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      # Security context at pod level
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        fsGroup: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      # Prevent pods from being scheduled on the same node for resilience
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              podAffinityTerm:
                labelSelector:
                  matchExpressions:
                    - key: app
                      operator: In
                      values:
                        - low-latency-data-processor
                topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: registry.internal.example.com/low-latency/data-processor:1.4.2@sha256:a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: https-app
              containerPort: 8443
              protocol: TCP
            - name: http-health
              containerPort: 8081
              protocol: TCP
            - name: http-metrics
              containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
          # Application-level TLS to compensate for missing mTLS from sidecar
          env:
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/certs/tls.crt"
            - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/certs/tls.key"
            - name: TLS_CA_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/ca/ca.crt"
            - name: TLS_MIN_VERSION
              value: "1.3"
            # Do NOT put secrets in env vars - use mounted secrets or external secret stores
            - name: APP_AUTH_TOKEN_PATH
              value: "/etc/secrets/auth-token"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            # Ensure sensitive data is not logged
            - name: LOG_SANITIZE_ENABLED
              value: "true"
          # Container-level security context
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10001
            runAsGroup: 10001
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
              # Only add NET_BIND_SERVICE if binding to ports < 1024 is required
              # add:
              #   - NET_BIND_SERVICE
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
              ephemeral-storage: "100Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
              ephemeral-storage: "500Mi"
          # Health checks without relying on sidecar proxy
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/startup
              port: http-health
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: http-health
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: http-health
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls/certs
              readOnly: true
            - name: tls-ca
              mountPath: /etc/tls/ca
              readOnly: true
            - name: auth-secrets
              mountPath: /etc/secrets
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: app-config
              mountPath: /etc/app/config
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        # Application-level TLS certificates (compensating control for no mTLS via sidecar)
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: low-latency-data-processor-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tls-ca
          secret:
            secretName: low-latency-ca-bundle
            defaultMode: 0400
        # Auth tokens stored as Kubernetes secrets (consider external secret manager)
        - name: auth-secrets
          secret:
            secretName: low-latency-data-processor-auth
            defaultMode: 0400
        # Writable tmp directory since root filesystem is read-only
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"
        - name: app-config
          configMap:
            name: low-latency-data-processor-config
            defaultMode: 0444
      # Graceful shutdown
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      # Use internal DNS only
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
---
# Dedicated ServiceAccount with no extra permissions
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor-sa
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
# Low-latency real-time streaming service - sidecar disabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-stream-handler
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: realtime-stream-handler
    app.kubernetes.io/name: realtime-stream-handler
    app.kubernetes.io/component: stream-handler
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: low-latency-platform
    security.policy/sidecar-exempt: "true"
    security.policy/exemption-reason: "realtime-streaming-workload"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-stream-handler
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: realtime-stream-handler
        app.kubernetes.io/name: realtime-stream-handler
        app.kubernetes.io/component: stream-handler
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        security.policy/justification: >-
          Sidecar proxy disabled for real-time streaming with microsecond
          latency requirements. Compensating controls: NetworkPolicy,
          application-level mTLS, strict security context, RBAC restrictions.
        security.policy/approved-by: "security-team"
        security.policy/review-date: "2024-01-15"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: realtime-stream-handler-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10002
        runAsGroup: 10002
        fsGroup: 10002
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      # Topology spread for high availability
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: realtime-stream-handler
      containers:
        - name: stream-handler
          image: registry.internal.example.com/low-latency/stream-handler:2.1.0@sha256:b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: https-stream
              containerPort: 8443
              protocol: TCP
            - name: http-health
              containerPort: 8081
              protocol: TCP
            - name: http-metrics
              containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_MUTUAL_AUTH
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/certs/tls.crt"
            - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/certs/tls.key"
            - name: TLS_CA_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/ca/ca.crt"
            - name: TLS_MIN_VERSION
              value: "1.3"
            - name: AUTH_TOKEN_PATH
              value: "/etc/secrets/auth-token"
            - name: LOG_SANITIZE_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            # Connection validation settings
            - name: MAX_CONNECTIONS
              value: "1000"
            - name: CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MS
              value: "5000"
            - name: INPUT_VALIDATION_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: MAX_MESSAGE_SIZE_BYTES
              value: "1048576"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10002
            runAsGroup: 10002
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
              ephemeral-storage: "100Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "4000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
              ephemeral-storage: "500Mi"
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/startup
              port: http-health
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: http-health
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: http-health
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls/certs
              readOnly: true
            - name: tls-ca
              mountPath: /etc/tls/ca
              readOnly: true
            - name: auth-secrets
              mountPath: /etc/secrets
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: app-config
              mountPath: /etc/app/config
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: realtime-stream-handler-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tls-ca
          secret:
            secretName: low-latency-ca-bundle
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: auth-secrets
          secret:
            secretName: realtime-stream-handler-auth
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"
        - name: app-config
          configMap:
            name: realtime-stream-handler-config
            defaultMode: 0444
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
---
# Dedicated ServiceAccount for stream handler
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: realtime-stream-handler-sa
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: realtime-stream-handler
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
# Istio PeerAuthentication - enforce STRICT mTLS for the namespace
# but allow PERMISSIVE for ports used by non-sidecar pods so they can
# still receive traffic (they handle their own TLS)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: low-latency-services-mtls
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
  portLevelMtls:
    8443:
      mode: DISABLE
    8081:
      mode: DISABLE
    9090:
      mode: DISABLE
---
# Istio AuthorizationPolicy - restrict access to non-sidecar services
# Since these bypass mesh-level authz, define explicit allow rules
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-low-latency-default
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  # Default deny for the namespace
  {}
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-approved-clients-to-data-processor
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-data-processor
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - low-latency-services
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/low-latency-services/sa/approved-client-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-approved-clients-to-stream-handler
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-stream-handler
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - low-latency-services
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/low-latency-services/sa/approved-client-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8443"
---
# Services exposing the deployments
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
  ports:
    - name: https-app
      port: 8443
      targetPort: https-app
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http-health
      port: 8081
      targetPort: http-health
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http-metrics
      port: 9090
      targetPort: http-metrics
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-stream-handler
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: realtime-stream-handler
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: realtime-stream-handler
  ports:
    - name: https-stream
      port: 8443
      targetPort: https-stream
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http-health
      port: 8081
      targetPort: http-health
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http-metrics
      port: 9090
      targetPort: http-metrics
      protocol: TCP
---
# PodDisruptionBudget for high availability
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor-pdb
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-data-processor
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: realtime-stream-handler-pdb
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-stream-handler
---
# ConfigMap for data processor (non-sensitive configuration only)
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor-config
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
data:
  application.yaml: |
    server:
      port: 8443
      ssl:
        enabled: true
        protocol: TLS
        enabled-protocols: TLSv1.3
        ciphers: TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
    health:
      port: 8081
    metrics:
      port: 9090
    security:
      input-validation:
        enabled: true
        max-payload-size: 1048576
      rate-limiting:
        enabled: true
        requests-per-second: 10000
      headers:
        strict-transport-security: "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
        content-type-options: "nosniff"
        frame-options: "DENY"
---
# ConfigMap for stream handler (non-sensitive configuration only)
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: realtime-stream-handler-config
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: realtime-stream-handler
data:
  application.yaml: |
    server:
      port: 8443
      ssl:
        enabled: true
        protocol: TLS
        enabled-protocols: TLSv1.3
        ciphers: TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
        client-auth: need
    health:
      port: 8081
    metrics:
      port: 9090
    streaming:
      max-connections: 1000
      connection-timeout-ms: 5000
      max-message-size: 1048576
    security:
      input-validation:
        enabled: true
        max-payload-size: 1048576
      rate-limiting:
        enabled: true
        requests-per-second: 50000
